name: dev-tools-toolbox
description: Agent-first toolbox root that separates active vendorable packages from legacy scripts and intake scaffolds.
zero_context_protocol: Open the chosen package's tool_manifest.json and README.md.
Ignore legacy and intake unless explicitly requested.

active_packages.name: final-tools
active_packages.purpose: General headless tools for workspace analysis, structured patching, and Tkinter audits.

active_packages.name: _app-journal
active_packages.purpose: SQLite-backed shared journal for notes, dev logs, decisions, and user or agent activity.

active_packages.name: _manifold-mcp
active_packages.purpose: Reversible text-evidence-hypergraph-text package built around evidence bags.

active_packages.name: _ollama-prompt-lab
active_packages.purpose: Local prompt evaluation and Ollama model comparison package.

inactive_areas.name: legacy
inactive_areas.rule: Reference only. Not the default agent surface.

inactive_areas.name: intake
inactive_areas.rule: Staging only. Not a complete tool surface.
